title: canonical_document_schema
description: Controlled baseline schema for the canonical OCR document model. Hardened from the Phase 3 schema audit and aligned to the current page-level contract. This schema represents one logical document. Multi-document manifests may produce multiple canonical documents without breaking this baseline contract.

ingestion_timestamp.description: Document ingestion timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

pages.description: Page-level document content aligned to the controlled page schema.

metadata.description: Document-level canonical metadata, including pipeline summaries, enrichment summaries, lineage, and extensible control metadata.
